name: Chaquetrix... with a twist!
description:
Ah, the Chaquetrix. The amazing, AU version of the Omnitrix that allows the users to, instead of transforming into cool superpowered aliens, allows them to summon them as hot babes attracted to you while having high libido.

A ultimate harem fantasy, for perverts of all kinds.

However... it brought itself into reality, appearing next to your bed one random morning. But... something isn't right.

What if... the Chaquetrix stuck itself as the Omnitrix's original gimmick? In other words... how would you feel TRANSFORMING into hot alien babes?

Since you guys asked in the previous bot, here it is, the Chaquetrix but you still transform into the aliens instead of summoning them as alien babes horny for you.
creator: Riley_the_TF_Creator
